title: The Diplomatic Pouch
writer: Moisei Zats, Boris Shcharansky, Aleksandr Dovzhenko
actors: Mattea Buyukli, A. Klymenko, Heorhii Zelondzhev-Shypov
plot: The true murder of the Soviet diplomat Teodor Nette, which narrates the difficulties in returning the diplomatic bag of the murdered agent to Russia, by sea and before it is found by the British secret police.
